content: The original Self-Refine framework, which relies on single-perspective iterative self-feedback to refine outputs without extra training, can be enhanced by integrating the multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from LLM self-reflection mechanisms to create a multi-perspective Self-Refine approach. This hybrid method retains Self-Refine’s core advantage of requiring no supervised data or additional training while reducing the blind spots that come from single-perspective self-feedback.
